creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
We have been over this I believe.  Our responses from bug #235857 still apply
and the solution to this problem is the same as it was back then: Update to
a newer revision of the ports tree. texinfo-6.5_4,1 has not been actual
since February.  Newest is texinfo-6.6_1,1 from ports r498913.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 235857 ***
